name: Cabbage Fruit Salad with Sour-Cream
recipeInstructions:
1. Prepare the cabbage and apple by washing, shredding, and dicing.
2. Use 1 tablespoon of lemon juice to lightly coat the diced apple to prevent darkening.
3. Toss the shredded cabbage, raisins, and diced apple together in a bowl.
4. In a separate bowl, mix the pineapple juice, salt, and sugar until well combined.
5. Add the sour cream to the fruit mixture and stir until smooth.
6. Combine the seasoned fruit dressing with the cabbage and apple salad.
7. Chill the salad before serving.
